channel.title: GNmaster
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNmaster, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 5 ways BofA Rewards can unlock more value
item.description: BofA Rewards offers members a wide range of financial benefits. Here are five ways you'll benefit from joining the program.

item.title: Meghan Trainor on Building Confidence and Healthy Habits
item.description: Meghan shares how she’s tuning out criticism, prioritizing her health, and building habits that help her feel stronger than ever.

item.title: What Happens to Your Body When You Drink Enough Water
8 Ways to Get the Protein You Need

item.description: Portable lamps are rarely, if ever, as powerful, precise, and multipurpose as the Lume Cube Edge Light Go.

item.title: WhatsApp adds prepaid phone recharges in India as its payments usage still lags

item.title: United has hiked prices 5 times, says higher fares may stay for awhile
item.description: United Airlines has hiked prices five times since the start of the global run-up in oil prices, and higher costs for travelers could be here to stay.

item.title: JetBlue changes its boarding order with new groups
item.description: JetBlue will introduce a new boarding order with numbered groups starting on April 29, adding a new group for certain priority passengers.
